personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | AWS / Python / PySpark Data Platform Specialist

summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience and a strong focus on Python, SQL, PySpark, ETL/ELT pipeline design, data modeling, and production data platform modernization. Built and operated regulated enterprise data pipelines ingesting telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, with emphasis on reliability, performance tuning, data quality, reporting, and stakeholder-facing analytics. Experienced across AWS data services, Airflow-style orchestration, Docker, CI/CD practices, dimensional modeling, data governance, and ML-enabled analytical workflows, with current hands-on upskilling in Databricks, Delta Lake, Snowflake, dbt, and modern lakehouse patterns.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected and maintained Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ enterprise endpoints, replacing manual processes with repeatable production data workflows.
Designed optimized Oracle schemas and historical retention models to support analytics, reporting, capacity forecasting, and seasonal risk analysis in a regulated banking environment.
Built a hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL, Redshift, and Python processing to support scalable telemetry analytics and ML forecasting workloads.
Developed PySpark-based processing patterns for large telemetry datasets, including partitioning, parallel processing, data preparation, and performance tuning for forecasting use cases.
Implemented data quality, reconciliation, monitoring, and validation practices across telemetry pipelines to improve completeness, accuracy, and reliability of production reporting.
Integrated disparate monitoring feeds from BMC TrueSight, CA Wily, and AppDynamics into unified reporting pipelines and executive dashboards for infrastructure and application health insights.
Developed ML forecasting workflows using Prophet and scikit-learn to predict capacity bottlenecks up to 6 months ahead, improving provisioning lead time and planning accuracy.
Containerized Python ETL jobs on EC2/ECS and applied Git-based development practices to improve repeatability, deployment readiness, and operational supportability.
Partnered with infrastructure, application, analytics, and leadership stakeholders to translate ambiguous capacity and performance needs into scalable technical solutions.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and other critical hospitality systems, supporting production observability and performance troubleshooting.
Led the FAST project by mining real-user and synthetic performance data from Gomez/Dynatrace sources to identify optimization opportunities adopted by engineering teams.
Built operational reporting and analytics workflows that transformed raw monitoring data into actionable performance recommendations for web and mobile systems.
Upgraded Dynatrace from 6.5 to 7.0 and enforced TLS 1.2 security with zero production monitoring regression during cutover.
Integrated HP Performance Center with Dynatrace to correlate load testing results with APM telemetry and support performance tuning decisions.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for a large financial services environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000-6,000 instrumented agents across the enterprise.
Built Perl and Korn Shell data extraction scripts for automated performance reporting, replacing manual weekly exports with repeatable operational data workflows.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, and custom management modules adopted as standards across client environments.
Led large-scale CA APM upgrades with zero unplanned downtime while coordinating cross-functional IT teams and production support stakeholders.
Collaborated with J2EE, WebLogic, and infrastructure teams to analyze bottlenecks, tune performance, and improve production monitoring practices.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom applications under load to identify throughput limits and bottlenecks across JDBC connections, threads, heap memory, CPU, and garbage collection.
Configured JMX Monitoring, Wily Introscope, and thread dump automation scripts to provide real-time diagnostic visibility during load tests.
Documented performance baselines and regression thresholds used by engineering teams for release readiness decisions.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while supporting transaction volumes at major enterprise scale.
Optimized C++ and OCCI transaction processing, reducing physical hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second query latency.
Built automated schema conversion, data validation, and migration correctness checks across millions of transaction records.
Developed a CPPUNIT testing framework in C++/OCCI/OCI to validate data migration accuracy and support reliable cutover.

experience.title: Architect / Developer (IRS CADE Project)
bullets: Designed UML class and sequence diagrams for a government modernization program with strict architecture and documentation expectations.
Developed CICS, MQ Series, XML, VC++, and DB2 integration modules supporting mainframe modernization and system integration workflows.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed high-availability multithreaded C++ billing interfaces using POSIX threads, mutex locks, semaphores, socket programming, and Marconi APIs for telecom billing systems.
Improved C/C++/Pro*C/PL/SQL billing process performance by reducing memory usage 75%, improving throughput 20%, and achieving 10x database performance through sequence optimization.
Maintained and enhanced AMDOCS Flexible Bill Formatter, EDI interfaces, and Enabler/CSM/EMS modules across invoicing, settlement, reporting, and production support workflows.
Automated WebLogic and WebSphere administration using Korn Shell scripting, reducing manual deployment and operational steps.
Supervised QA cycles and production bug triage using Mercury Test Director while supporting billing and customer management systems.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PySpark, Java, C++, Perl, Korn Shell Scripting, PL/SQL

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built an ML-enabled capacity forecasting platform using Python, PySpark, Prophet, scikit-learn, and Streamlit to replace manual forecasting workflows. The system processed enterprise telemetry, prepared analytical datasets, predicted bottlenecks up to 6 months ahead, and surfaced capacity insights through stakeholder-facing dashboards.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless data platform pattern using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, Parquet, and PySpark for scalable analytics. Addressed common data lake concerns including raw landing zones, ETL processing, query optimization, compression, data access, and cost/performance tradeoffs.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end agentic job application pipeline using Python, Grok/xAI API, FAISS, sentence-transformers, and document rendering. The system performs semantic duplicate detection, job scoring, resume/cover generation, quality checks, and application tracking through repeatable orchestration.
